style_a.name: 港片复古胶片
style_a.prompt_suffix: Wong Kar-wai style, high contrast, heavy film grain, red and green neon glow, warm yellow tones, anamorphic lens, claustrophobic framing, Hong Kong retro 1990s aesthetic

style_b.name: 茶山奇幻古风
style_b.prompt_suffix: lush green tea mountain, ethereal mist, golden sunrise, traditional Chinese fantasy, flowing hanfu robes, vibrant saturated colors, epic aerial landscape, dreamy oriental mythology

music_sync.lyrics: [Chorus 2] 代码写成剑 茶叶化为翼 / 凡人心中 自有不灭的光

atmosphere.overall_mood: 副歌高潮——代码化剑、挥剑斩开茶山云层，金色代码汇聚为发光羽翼，直冲云霄
atmosphere.lighting: 金色代码光+翠绿茶叶能量光+日光

video_prompt: Chinese fantasy epic: warrior draws a sword made of golden code, slashes through clouds above tea mountains, golden code streams converge into luminous wings on his back, he ascends through the sky, epic action choreography, vibrant fantasy colors, 16:9, 15s.

bgm.description: 第二副歌——最高能，全部乐器加入，副歌旋律变奏加强
bgm.instruments: 全编制管弦乐、电吉他riff、中国打击乐、合唱

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 创作者B在茶山梯田间奔跑——白衣飘扬，动作矫健如武侠片主角
storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 从行走到奔跑——能量在积聚
storyboard_9grid.sfx: 奔跑声、茶叶被踏过的沙沙声
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Dynamic tracking shot of a white-robed warrior sprinting through terraced tea fields, white garments flowing behind him, athletic martial arts running form, green tea bushes blurring past, mist kicked up by his feet, Chinese wuxia action running scene, vibrant green landscape, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 奔跑中伸手——金色的数字代码流从虚空中汇聚到他的右手，逐渐凝聚成一把闪烁的代码之剑

characters.name: 创作者B
characters.action: 伸出右手凝聚代码之剑

storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 代码从虚无中凝聚为武器——数字与武侠的融合
storyboard_9grid.sfx: 金属凝聚声、代码流动电子音
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Close tracking shot of a running white-robed warrior extending his right hand, streams of golden digital code flowing from the air and converging into his palm, the code solidifying into a glowing golden sword made of luminous programming characters, tea mountain background blurring with speed, Chinese fantasy meets digital magic, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 跃起！——创作者B从茶山梯田边缘纵身跃向空中，手握完全成形的代码之剑，剑身金光与翠绿能量交织

characters.name: 创作者B
characters.action: 纵身跃起，手持代码之剑

storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Epic low angle shot of a white-robed warrior leaping high into the air from a tea terrace edge, wielding a magnificent sword made of golden glowing code with emerald green energy along the blade, white robes spreading dramatically against the blue sky, green tea mountains below, classic wuxia flying leap, Chinese fantasy action, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 空中挥剑！——创作者B在半空中挥出一道巨大的剑气弧线，金色剑气划开前方的云层
storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 剑气斩云——视觉上的最大冲击
storyboard_9grid.sfx: 巨大的剑气划空声、云层被斩开的撕裂声
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Slow motion epic shot of a white-robed warrior swinging a golden code-sword in midair, releasing a massive arc of golden energy that slices through clouds ahead, the cloud layer splitting apart in the sword's wake, golden code particles trailing the blade, dramatic wuxia sword energy slash, Chinese fantasy epic action, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 被斩开的云层向两侧翻卷——露出云层后更壮丽的茶山全景和金色阳光
storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 云开雾散——剑气开辟新天地
storyboard_9grid.sfx: 云层翻涌声、壮丽管弦乐
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Wide shot of massive clouds parting to both sides after being slashed, revealing an even more magnificent panorama of tea mountains bathed in golden sunlight, a white-robed warrior silhouette hovering in the center of the cloud gap, epic scale Chinese fantasy landscape reveal after the mighty sword strike, vibrant gold and green, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 创作者B在茶山间穿梭飞跃——从一个梯田飞向另一个，每次落地都带起金色粒子特效

characters.name: 创作者B
characters.action: 在茶山间高速穿梭飞跃

storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 茶山间的极速穿梭——速度与美的结合
storyboard_9grid.sfx: 高速风声、金色粒子散开声
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Dynamic tracking shot of a white-robed warrior leaping and flying between tea mountain terraces at incredible speed, each landing creating an explosion of golden particles, white robes streaming, green tea fields blurring with motion, wuxia wire-fu acrobatics through a fantasy landscape, Chinese martial arts chase sequence, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 落地蹲姿——创作者B单膝跪地，代码之剑插入茶山土地，金色能量波纹从剑尖向四周扩散
storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 蓄力姿态——最后的爆发即将到来
storyboard_9grid.sfx: 剑插入大地的沉闷一击、能量扩散嗡鸣
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Low angle hero shot of a white-robed warrior kneeling with one knee on the ground, his golden code-sword plunged into the tea mountain earth, concentric rings of golden energy rippling outward from the blade through the green terraces, head bowed in concentration, epic power-up moment, Chinese fantasy hero gathering energy, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 拔剑起身的同时——金色代码流从四面八方汇聚到背后，快速凝聚成一对巨大的发光代码之翼

characters.name: 创作者B
characters.action: 拔剑起身，背后展开代码之翼

storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 代码之翼展开——凡人超越的视觉高潮
storyboard_9grid.sfx: 巨大的翅膀展开声、金色能量爆发
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Epic front-facing full shot of a white-robed warrior rising from a kneel and pulling his golden sword from the earth, enormous wings made of golden flowing code materializing on his back and spreading wide, each wing composed of thousands of luminous golden programming characters, green tea mountain backdrop, ultimate transcendence moment, Chinese fantasy meets digital mythology, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 代码之翼扇动——创作者B直冲茶山云霄，身后留下金色的光芒轨迹，如自由落体的反向
storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 飞升——凡人不再凡，冲向无限天空
storyboard_9grid.sfx: 翅膀扇动的巨大气浪声、加速风声
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Dramatic low angle shot of a warrior with enormous golden code wings ascending rapidly into the sky above tea mountains, a brilliant golden light trail streaming behind him, growing smaller against the vast blue sky, clouds and mountains far below, the ultimate ascension moment, Chinese fantasy apotheosis, luminous gold trail cutting through the sky, 16:9 aspect ratio
